paper_title: Automatic Security Evaluation and (Related-key) Differential Characteristic Search: Application to SIMON, PRESENT, LBlock, DES(L) and Other Bit-oriented Block Ciphers
default_next_action: Tighten the calibration lane or increase the certified bound before treating larger-round claims as trustworthy.

cases.description: Appendix A.1 Table 4 4-round minimum active S-boxes with the exact PRESENT S-box lane.
cases.expected_claim: Table 4 reports that the minimum number of active S-boxes for 4-round PRESENT-80 is 2.
cases.next_action_on_unresolved: Raise solve confidence for the 4-round exact lane before using it as a baseline calibration checkpoint.

cases.description: Appendix A.1 Table 4 5-round minimum active S-boxes with the exact PRESENT S-box lane.
cases.expected_claim: Table 4 reports that the minimum number of active S-boxes for 5-round PRESENT-80 is 3.
cases.next_action_on_unresolved: Keep tuning the 5-round exact lane until the checkpoint is either certified or clearly contradicted.

cases.description: Appendix A.1 Table 4 6-round minimum active S-boxes with the exact PRESENT S-box lane.
cases.expected_claim: Table 4 reports that the minimum number of active S-boxes for 6-round PRESENT-80 is 5.
cases.next_action_on_unresolved: Increase solve budget or tighten the 6-round exact lane until the optimum is certified.

cases.description: Appendix A.1 support check for the 12-round lower bound N12 >= 16.
cases.expected_claim: Appendix A.1 claims that any 12 consecutive rounds of PRESENT-80 have at least 16 active S-boxes.
cases.paper_location: Appendix A.1, Table 4 and the concluding paragraph immediately below it
cases.next_action_on_unresolved: Keep calibrating smaller windows or raise the certified lower bound before promoting the 24-round 2^-64 derivation.
